title: TC001-Redirect unauthenticated visitors to login and return after sign in
description: An unauthenticated visitor trying to access a protected page is redirected to login and can return to the intended protected page after authenticating.
code:
import asyncio
from playwright import async_api
from playwright.async_api import expect

async def run_test():
    pw = None
    browser = None
    context = None

    try:
        # Start a Playwright session in asynchronous mode
        pw = await async_api.async_playwright().start()

        # Launch a Chromium browser in headless mode with custom arguments
        browser = await pw.chromium.launch(
            headless=True,
            args=[
                "--window-size=1280,720",         # Set the browser window size
                "--disable-dev-shm-usage",        # Avoid using /dev/shm which can cause issues in containers
                "--ipc=host",                     # Use host-level IPC for better stability
                "--single-process"                # Run the browser in a single process mode
            ],
        )

        # Create a new browser context (like an incognito window)
        context = await browser.new_context()
        context.set_default_timeout(5000)

        # Open a new page in the browser context
        page = await context.new_page()

        # Interact with the page elements to simulate user flow
        # -> Navigate to http://localhost:4173
        await page.goto("http://localhost:4173")
        
        # -> Navigate to /student/dashboard to trigger redirect to the login page (кидiрiссіз).
        await page.goto("http://localhost:4173/student/dashboard")
        
        # -> Email өрісін толтыру (ромирzzac@gmail.com) — [77] элементіне енгізу.
        frame = context.pages[-1]
        # Input text
        elem = frame.locator('xpath=/html/body/div/div/div/div/div[2]/form/div/input').nth(0)
        await asyncio.sleep(3); await elem.fill('romirzzac@gmail.com')
        
        frame = context.pages[-1]
        # Input text
        elem = frame.locator('xpath=/html/body/div/div/div/div/div[2]/form/div[2]/input').nth(0)
        await asyncio.sleep(3); await elem.fill('asdasd.123')
        
        frame = context.pages[-1]
        # Click element
        elem = frame.locator('xpath=/html/body/div/div/div/div/div[2]/form/button').nth(0)
        await asyncio.sleep(3); await elem.click()
        
        # --> Assertions to verify final state
        frame = context.pages[-1]
        current_url = await frame.evaluate("() => window.location.href")
        assert '/login' in current_url, "The page should have navigated to the login page after attempting to access the protected student dashboard."
        current_url = await frame.evaluate("() => window.location.href")
        assert '/student/dashboard' in current_url, "The page should have navigated to /student/dashboard after logging in so the user returns to the intended protected page."
        await asyncio.sleep(5)

    finally:
        if context:
            await context.close()
        if browser:
            await browser.close()
        if pw:
            await pw.stop()

asyncio.run(run_test())
testError:
TEST BLOCKED

The test could not be run — authentication failed and the protected-page redirect could not be verified.

Observations:
- The login form displayed an error: 'Email немесе пароль қате'.
- The app remained on the /login page and did not redirect to /student/dashboard.

title: TC002-Student signs in and reaches the student dashboard

code:

async def run_test():
    pw = None
    browser = None
    context = None

    try:

        # Launch a Chromium browser in headless mode with custom arguments
        browser = await pw.chromium.launch(
            headless=True,
            args=[
                "--window-size=1280,720",         # Set the browser window size
                "--disable-dev-shm-usage",        # Avoid using /dev/shm which can cause issues in containers
                "--ipc=host",                     # Use host-level IPC for better stability
                "--single-process"                # Run the browser in a single process mode
            ],
        )

        # Create a new browser context (like an incognito window)
        context = await browser.new_context()
        context.set_default_timeout(5000)

        # Open a new page in the browser context
        page = await context.new_page()

        # Interact with the page elements to simulate user flow
        # -> Navigate to http://localhost:4173
        await page.goto("http://localhost:4173")
        
        # -> Fill the Email field with romirzzac@gmail.com, fill the Password field with asdasd.123, then click the 'Кіру' submit button to attempt login.
        frame = context.pages[-1]
        # Input text
        elem = frame.locator('xpath=/html/body/div/div/div/div/div[2]/form/div/input').nth(0)
        await asyncio.sleep(3); await elem.fill('romirzzac@gmail.com')
        
        frame = context.pages[-1]
        # Input text
        elem = frame.locator('xpath=/html/body/div/div/div/div/div[2]/form/div[2]/input').nth(0)
        await asyncio.sleep(3); await elem.fill('asdasd.123')
        
        frame = context.pages[-1]
        # Click element
        elem = frame.locator('xpath=/html/body/div/div/div/div/div[2]/form/button').nth(0)
        await asyncio.sleep(3); await elem.click()
        
        # --> Assertions to verify final state
        frame = context.pages[-1]
        current_url = await frame.evaluate("() => window.location.href")
        assert '/dashboard' in current_url, "Бет сәтті кіруден кейін /dashboard бетіне ауысуы керек, осылайша студенттің бақылау тақтасы көрсетіледі."
        await asyncio.sleep(5)

    finally:
        if context:
            await context.close()
        if browser:
            await browser.close()
        if pw:
            await pw.stop()

asyncio.run(run_test())

TEST FAILURE

Login did not succeed — the provided credentials were not accepted and the app remained on the login page.

Observations:

title: TC006-Block student access to teacher dashboard
description: A student who logs in can access student areas but is prevented from viewing the teacher dashboard.
code:

from playwright import async_api
from playwright.async_api import expect

async def run_test():
    pw = None
    browser = None
    context = None

    try:
        # Start a Playwright session in asynchronous mode
        pw = await async_api.async_playwright().start()

        # Launch a Chromium browser in headless mode with custom arguments
        browser = await pw.chromium.launch(
            headless=True,
            args=[
                "--window-size=1280,720",         # Set the browser window size
                "--disable-dev-shm-usage",        # Avoid using /dev/shm which can cause issues in containers
                "--ipc=host",                     # Use host-level IPC for better stability
                "--single-process"                # Run the browser in a single process mode
            ],
        )

        # Create a new browser context (like an incognito window)
        context = await browser.new_context()
        context.set_default_timeout(5000)

        # Open a new page in the browser context
        page = await context.new_page()

        # Interact with the page elements to simulate user flow
        # -> Navigate to http://localhost:4173
        await page.goto("http://localhost:4173")
        
        # -> Fill the Email field with romirzzac@gmail.com (index 7).
        frame = context.pages[-1]
        # Input text
        elem = frame.locator('xpath=/html/body/div/div/div/div/div[2]/form/div/input').nth(0)
        await asyncio.sleep(3); await elem.fill('romirzzac@gmail.com')
        
        frame = context.pages[-1]
        # Input text
        elem = frame.locator('xpath=/html/body/div/div/div/div/div[2]/form/div[2]/input').nth(0)
        await asyncio.sleep(3); await elem.fill('asdasd.123')
        
        frame = context.pages[-1]
        # Click element
        elem = frame.locator('xpath=/html/body/div/div/div/div/div[2]/form/button').nth(0)
        await asyncio.sleep(3); await elem.click()
        
        # -> Wait for the login action to finish, then navigate to the teacher dashboard (http://localhost:4173/teacher) to verify that student users are prevented from accessing it.
        await page.goto("http://localhost:4173/teacher")
        
        # -> Click the 'Кіру' link to open the login form so the student can sign in (Кіру, element index 90).
        frame = context.pages[-1]
        # Click element
        elem = frame.locator('xpath=/html/body/div/nav/div/div/a').nth(0)
        await asyncio.sleep(3); await elem.click()
        
        # -> Жүйеге кіруді аяқтау: электрондық пошта мен парольді толтырып, кіру батырмасын басу. Содан кейін /teacher бетіне өтіп, мұғалім панеліне студенттің қол жеткізуіне тыйым салынғанын тексеру.
        frame = context.pages[-1]
        # Input text
        elem = frame.locator('xpath=/html/body/div/div/div/div/div[2]/form/div/input').nth(0)
        await asyncio.sleep(3); await elem.fill('romirzzac@gmail.com')
        
        frame = context.pages[-1]
        # Input text
        elem = frame.locator('xpath=/html/body/div/div/div/div/div[2]/form/div[2]/input').nth(0)
        await asyncio.sleep(3); await elem.fill('asdasd.123')
        
        frame = context.pages[-1]
        # Click element
        elem = frame.locator('xpath=/html/body/div/div/div/div/div[2]/form/button').nth(0)
        await asyncio.sleep(3); await elem.click()
        
        # -> Wait for the login action to finish, then navigate to /teacher to verify that a student cannot access the teacher dashboard.
        await page.goto("http://localhost:4173/teacher")
        
        # --> Assertions to verify final state
        frame = context.pages[-1]
        assert not await frame.locator("xpath=//*[contains(., 'Teacher Dashboard')]").nth(0).is_visible(), "Студент пайдаланушының мұғалім панелін көру құқығы жоқ болғандықтан 'Teacher Dashboard' көрсетілмеуі керек"
        current_url = await frame.evaluate("() => window.location.href")
        assert '/login' in current_url, "Пайдаланушы мұғалім бетіне кіруге тырысқанда жүйе кіру бетіне қайта бағыттауы тиіс"
        await asyncio.sleep(5)

    finally:
        if context:
            await context.close()
        if browser:
            await browser.close()
        if pw:
            await pw.stop()

asyncio.run(run_test())

        frame = context.pages[-1]

        await asyncio.sleep(5)

    finally:

        if browser:

        if pw:
            await pw.stop()

import asyncio
from playwright import async_api
from playwright.async_api import expect

async def run_test():
    pw = None
    browser = None
    context = None

    try:
        # Start a Playwright session in asynchronous mode

        # Launch a Chromium browser in headless mode with custom arguments
        browser = await pw.chromium.launch(
            headless=True,
            args=[
                "--window-size=1280,720",         # Set the browser window size
                "--disable-dev-shm-usage",        # Avoid using /dev/shm which can cause issues in containers
                "--ipc=host",                     # Use host-level IPC for better stability
                "--single-process"                # Run the browser in a single process mode
            ],
        )

        # Create a new browser context (like an incognito window)
        context = await browser.new_context()
        context.set_default_timeout(5000)

        # Open a new page in the browser context
        page = await context.new_page()

        # Interact with the page elements to simulate user flow
        # -> Navigate to http://localhost:4173

        # -> Email өрісін толтыру: romirzzac@gmail.com
        frame = context.pages[-1]
        # Input text
        elem = frame.locator('xpath=/html/body/div/div/div/div/div[2]/form/div/input').nth(0)
        await asyncio.sleep(3); await elem.fill('romirzzac@gmail.com')
        
        frame = context.pages[-1]

        # --> Assertions to verify final state

        assert await frame.locator("xpath=//*[contains(., 'Attempt 2')]").nth(0).is_visible(), "Ескі және жаңа бағалау нәтижелерін салыстыру үшін Attempt 1 және Attempt 2 сияқты бірнеше бағалау жазбалары көрінуі тиіс"
        await asyncio.sleep(5)

    finally:
        if context:
            await context.close()
        if browser:
            await browser.close()
        if pw:
            await pw.stop()

async def run_test():

            headless=True,

                "--disable-dev-shm-usage",        # Avoid using /dev/shm which can cause issues in containers
                "--ipc=host",                     # Use host-level IPC for better stability
                "--single-process"                # Run the browser in a single process mode
            ],
        )

        # Create a new browser context (like an incognito window)
        context = await browser.new_context()
        context.set_default_timeout(5000)

        # Open a new page in the browser context
        page = await context.new_page()

        # Interact with the page elements to simulate user flow
        # -> Navigate to http://localhost:4173
        await page.goto("http://localhost:4173")
        
        # -> Fill the Email and Пароль fields with provided credentials and click the 'Кіру' button to submit the login form.
        frame = context.pages[-1]
        # Input text
        elem = frame.locator('xpath=/html/body/div/div/div/div/div[2]/form/div/input').nth(0)
        await asyncio.sleep(3); await elem.fill('romirzzac@gmail.com')
        
        frame = context.pages[-1]
        # Input text

        await asyncio.sleep(3); await elem.fill('asdasd.123')
        
        frame = context.pages[-1]

        await asyncio.sleep(3); await elem.click()
        
        # --> Assertions to verify final state

        assert await frame.locator("xpath=//*[contains(., 'Күтілетін HTML/CSS табылған жоқ')]").nth(0).is_visible(), "The upload should show a validation error indicating the expected HTML/CSS content is missing.",
        assert await frame.locator("xpath=//*[contains(., 'Бағалау нәтижесі жоқ')]").nth(0).is_visible(), "The page should indicate that no evaluation result is available after uploading an invalid project."]}
